findings.summary: SparkFun XRP robot controller with RP2350B. AP63357 reference voltage wrong, bus widths inflated, QSPI interface missed.

correct.description: RP2350B microcontroller correctly identified with proper pin count
DRV8411A dual motor drivers correctly identified

incorrect.description: AP63357 buck converter Vref reported as 0.6V but datasheet specifies 0.765V reference

missed.description: QSPI flash memory interface to W25Q128 not detected as memory bus

suggestions: Use correct Vref of 0.765V for AP63357 (check datasheet feedback divider reference)
Count unique data signals in bus, not total net segments, to avoid inflated bus widths
Detect QSPI memory interfaces from CS/CLK/D0-D3 net patterns to flash ICs

findings.summary: SparkFun XRP Controller (RP2350B robotics board). Correct: 184 components, DRV8411A motor drivers, LSM6DSOX IMU, crystal, USB compliance, WS2812B, power OR-ing. Incorrect: AP63357 Vref wrong (0.6V vs 0.765V giving 3.87V vs actual 5V), bus widths inflated by counting label instances across sheets. Missed: QSPI memory interface, SPI to radio module, I2C bus to IMU.

correct.description: U1 RP2350B correctly identified with 81 pins
U7/U8 DRV8411A motor drivers correctly identified
Crystal Y1 12MHz with 15pF load caps correctly detected
USB-C compliance with 5.1k CC pulldowns pass
D4 WS2812B addressable LED chain detected

incorrect.description: AP63357 output voltage calculated as 3.873V using wrong Vref=0.6V (correct Vref=0.765V gives 4.94V matching 5V rail)
Bus signal widths inflated: QSPI_D width=12 (actual 4), IMU_INT width=4 (actual 2)

missed.description: QSPI memory interface between RP2350B and W25Q128/APS6404L not detected
SPI interface to RM2 radio module not detected

suggestions: Add AP63357 Vref=0.765V to lookup table
Fix bus width to count unique signal names not label instances
